title: Senior Teacher - NIT Trichy - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NIT Trichy - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Trichy. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About NIT Trichy:
NIT Trichy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy!
